_comment: Hand-curated per-enhancement restrictions, keyed by faction name then enhancement name. The scraper can only reliably derive 'nonCharacterOnly' (from the (Upgrade) suffix); every other restriction is opt-in here. Falsy/missing = no validation. Schema per entry: { characterOnly?: boolean, nonCharacterOnly?: boolean, notOnEpicHeroes?: boolean, allowedHosts?: string[], limit?: number, autoTake?: string[] }. Example: "NECRONS": { "Enlivened Sentinels": { "allowedHosts": ["NECRON WARRIORS"], "limit": 1 } }
